description: Standard cross-print mirror. Two corpus prints, same species (National Pokedex no. 75 Alolan Graveler), identical canonical flavor text, both stage the same diagnostic visual markers (dark crystalline body, horseshoe-shaped magnetic brow, dravite-consumption surface crystallization). The flavor-text identity across both prints canonicalizes the dietary-divergence mechanism as a species-level lore anchor rather than a per-print authorial choice. Cohort node extended to include the second print and to retire the 'awaiting enrichment' caveat. Mirrors the wave 26 Snubbull and wave 24 Starly cross-print precedents. The sigh is professional, not personal.
other_candidates_considered: Alolan Graveler CSI-33 → Alolan Grimer CSE-130 in-cohort sibling edge (both Alolan-form variants, both in corpus); rejected because the cohort node already anchors both and a direct 1:1 sibling edge would be redundant with the appears_on fan-out.
